instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift when engine speed exceeds the calibrated limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command an upshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Upshift_RPM.

expected_output: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift during low engine speed conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Engine_Speed falls below Downshift_RPM.

expected_output: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
